content:
2 min read
Just now

--

I’m Richard, and I’m Here to Think Out Loud About AI
I’m an AI/ML Software Engineer and currently pursuing my Master’s in Computer Science at the University of Massachusetts Amherst. Before this, I worked at Zoho, where I contributed to AI-powered writing tools, NLP systems, and large-scale software products used by millions of users.
That is the professional version.
The slightly more honest version: I spend a lot of time thinking about how AI can solve real-world problems — and occasionally turn one small idea into a full architecture diagram at 2 AM.
Why I’m Starting This
AI is moving fast. Every week there is a new model, a new tool, a new agent framework, and another post saying, “This changes everything.”
Maybe it does.
But I’m more interested in a simpler question:
How do we build AI products that are actually useful in the real world?
Not just cool demos.
Not just buzzwords.
Not just “upload a PDF and call it a platform.”
I want to explore practical AI systems, product ideas, responsible AI, private AI assistants, RAG applications, automation tools, and the messy journey of turning ideas into working products.
What I’ll Write About
This space will be my public notebook for ideas, experiments, and lessons.
I’ll write about:

• AI product ideas

• RAG systems and agentic workflows

• Private and responsible AI

• Startup and product thinking

• Software engineering lessons

• Automation ideas for real businesses

• Things I’m building, testing, questioning, or possibly overthinking
Some posts may be technical. Some may be product-focused. Some may be early ideas that need criticism before they become useful.
And honestly, that is part of the goal.
Building in Public
I don’t want this to be a place where I only share perfect conclusions.
I want to share the process:
The idea.
The mistake.
The lesson.
The “this could be big” moment.
The “never mind, this needs work” moment.
Good products are rarely built in one perfect attempt. They are shaped through feedback, testing, criticism, and a lot of revisions.
So I’m here to share, learn, build, and hopefully get better with every post.
Connect With Me
I’m always happy to connect with engineers, founders, researchers, builders, and anyone who enjoys discussing AI beyond the hype.
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/richardwatsonsa
GitHub: github.com/RW2523
Website / Portfolio: richardwatsonsa.netlify.app/
Final Thought
This is my first post on Medium, so I’ll keep it simple.
I’m here to share ideas, write about AI products, explore real-world problems, and learn through feedback.
Some ideas may become products.
Some may become research.
Some may become lessons.
Some may just prove that coffee is not a business strategy.
Either way, I’m excited to start.
If you’re interested in AI, RAG, private AI assistants, startups, product thinking, or building useful software, follow along.
Let’s build things that are not just impressive in demos, but actually useful in real life.
